name: Publish to WordPress
author: Moldavite
description: Publish the active note as a WordPress draft, with safe updates on re-publish. WordPress.com Simple sites require OAuth and are not supported.
instructions: Enable the plugin and approve its requested permissions.
Press `Cmd+P` and run **Configure WordPress publishing** first.
Enter your HTTPS site URL, WordPress username, and an Application Password; Moldavite verifies them before saving to Keychain.
Open a note and run **Publish note to WordPress…**. The first run creates a draft and later runs update it.
